title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take time off due to illness or medical appointments. Employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave per calendar year, which can be used as needed. If you are unable to attend work due to illness, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can report your absence via email or phone call. For absences longer than three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. If you have any questions about your sick leave balance or need assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to keep your supervisor updated on your recovery and expected return date.
